payload.text: What’s the code to add Gemini in. My app

**Designing Gemini Playground**

I'm focusing on building a "Gemini Playground" for integrating Gemini. I'm prioritizing comprehensive code examples to show integration. My goal is a high-quality, useful tool for other React developers.


**Defining Feature Set**

I've decided to build a "Gemini Integration Guide" app. It'll demonstrate a range of Gemini API features with the `@google/genai` SDK and React. Key components will be a `geminiService.ts` for API calls, and dedicated components for text, image, video, live audio, and search functionalities. My plan also incorporates the use of React 18+, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and strict adherence to the SDK guidelines. I'm aiming for a structured and aesthetically pleasing design.

entries.description: App metadata including required permissions for camera and microphone to support the Live API demo.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font Awesome for icons.
Application entry point using React 18 createRoot API.
Global TypeScript types and interfaces for the application.
Main application component managing routing and overall layout.
Service layer for interacting with the Google GenAI SDK.
Chat interface for standard text generation and multimodal capabilities.
UI for generating and displaying AI-generated images.
Video generation component with Veo integration and mandatory API key handling.
Grounding demo showing how Gemini uses Google Search for factual accuracy.
Live API demo for real-time voice conversations.
